ext.attribution: 81 B eval-runtime plus 7 B stdlib-load-lib; mandatory C1 lease, retirement and resident Buffer-predicate correctness

overlay_vma.rule_after_authorization: frozen-at-zero; no further debit without simultaneous structural relief

promotion_conditions: The integration gate consumes this authorization and emits a new addendum receipt; the original C1 block receipt is immutable historical evidence.
The latency value string remains LIMITATION-STABLE with performance-bar=not-passed, the dated exception and cure C2/1.2.
The regular R4/R5/R6 repin and full fresh G5/G6 evidence chain remain mandatory.
Wave-seal user documentation states 1.90 s first call after a definition, 0.20 s warm, and the batching hint; C2 remains a committed 1.2 cure.
owner_decision: Authorize the exact 88-byte EXT debit. The 81+7 attribution closes, the symbol/namepool credits are bound, and the remaining 8689-byte margin carries the release-critical correctness bytes.
claim_limit: This authorization permits the measured integration capacity deltas. It does not relabel the latency limitation as a performance pass, promote a product set, preserve the stopped G5 run, or claim R4/R5/R6/G6 acceptance.
